name: PAMT CORP
summary: PAMT CORP is a holding company providing truckload dry van carrier services transporting general commodities throughout the continental United States, Mexico, and select Canadian provinces. Services include dedicated, expedited, automotive, local, regional, and long-haul truckload operations, plus brokerage and logistics services. Key freight includes automotive parts, consumer goods, and manufactured goods. The company operates 2,094 trucks and 8,020 trailers, with major customers including General Motors, Ford Motor Company, and Walmart.
